notes: Core mechanics are present but the river collision detection is broken (frog dies immediately in water even on logs due to y-coordinate mismatch between frog.y and lane.y), making the game nearly unplayable in the upper half; home arrival logic also has edge cases causing false deaths.
A solid but imperfect Frogger clone with working core loop and controls, but grid/alignment quirks, simplistic visuals, and some gameplay roughness keep it well below top-tier quality.
